name: pr_lit
drl:
rule "eq_a" when T0(f0 == 2.5) then end
rule "ne_a" when T0(f0 != 2.5) then end
rule "eq_b" when T0(f0 == -1.5) then end
rule "ne_b" when T0(f0 != -1.5) then end
rule "eq_c" when T0(f0 == -0.5) then end
rule "ne_c" when T0(f0 != -0.5) then end
rule "eq_d" when T0(f0 == 2.0) then end
rule "ne_d" when T0(f0 != 2.0) then end
rule "feq" when T1(f1 == 2) then end
